overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit commercial district at night. The character transitions from outdoor sidewalks lined with futuristic architecture to an indoor commercial lobby, featuring prominent cyan and pink neon lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon-lit commercial towers

events.description: futuristic sedan with glowing headlights drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk through the neon-lit commercial district, following a pedestrian in a red jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead at steady pace
futuristic black sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall building with geometric white facade and prominent cyan neon trim lines
skyscraper covered in large vertical digital advertisements with changing imagery
tall palm trees lining the street edge between sidewalk and road
modern horizontal light bars on tall poles illuminating the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk in a futuristic city at night, flanked by a massive office building with cyan neon trim on the left and a busy multi-lane street on the right. Palm trees and digital billboards line the street while moderate traffic flows by, and sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with outdoor restaurant seating under overhang

events.description: approaching building entrance with outdoor seating area and red rope barriers
passing through automatic glass doors into the building interior

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering a commercial building, passing outdoor seating and through glass entry doors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past outdoor seating area

entered.detail: overhanging architectural structure with integrated cyan neon lighting
restaurant patio with tables, chairs, and red velvet rope barriers
large transparent automatic doors leading into the building lobby

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a commercial building entrance featuring an outdoor seating area with red ropes and tables. Walking under the illuminated canopy, the character passes through automatic glass doors, transitioning from the neon-lit street to the building interior while the street and palm trees recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building lobby with reception and digital advertising displays

events.description: lighting shifts from bright neon outdoor to dimmer, warmer artificial indoor lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the building lobby past reception desk and digital displays, approaching elevator area

notable_agents.action: person in yellow safety vest standing near wall looking at device
person sitting on lobby bench looking at phone

entered.detail: dark modern reception counter with glowing blue accent lighting and digital displays
large vertical screens displaying colorful product advertisements and brand logos
metal elevator doors with red accent lighting above
modern benches and seating areas in the lobby center

segments.scene_description: Inside the building lobby, the character walks across a reflective marble floor toward elevator doors at the far end. The space features a reception desk with blue lighting on the left, large digital advertisement screens on the right, and sparse NPCs standing or sitting in the area. The lighting is noticeably dimmer and warmer compared to the vibrant neon outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit city street into the more subdued atmosphere of a corporate building lobby. It begins by trailing a character along a wet concrete sidewalk, flanked by a massive office building with cyan trim and a busy multi-lane street lined with palm trees and digital billboards. As the character approaches the building entrance, the camera moves past an outdoor seating area and under an illuminated canopy, passing through automatic glass doors as the street and palm trees recede into the background. The scene then shifts into the interior, where the character walks across a reflective marble floor past a blue-lit reception desk and large digital advertisement screens. Finally, the environment transitions to a dimmer, warmer lighting scheme as the camera moves toward elevator doors at the far end of the lobby.
